response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise ecosystems or IDE internals. While his background in JVM-adjacent languages (D, C#) and strong software engineering principles are promising, the absence of demonstrated work in Spring, build tools, or application servers raises concerns about his immediate fit for this role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture principles
Experience with multi-language ecosystems and adapting to different tech stacks
Proven ability to drive innovation and usability in developer tools (e.g., MCP, GISCollective)
concerns: No direct experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) or JVM tooling
Limited exposure to IDE internals or language tooling development
Most recent roles focus on full-stack or AI-agent infrastructure rather than JVM/IDE specialization
